Title: Resident Evil Requiem – All Puzzle Solutions

URL Source: http://www.keengamer.com/articles/guides/resident-evil-requiem-all-puzzle-solutions/

Published Time: 2026-03-02T19:01:39+00:00

Markdown Content:
[![Image 1: All Puzzle Solutions Resident Evil Requiem](https://www.keengamer.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/All-Puzzle-Solutions-Resident-Evil-Requiem-780x439.jpg)](https://www.keengamer.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/All-Puzzle-Solutions-Resident-Evil-Requiem.jpg)In _Resident Evil Requiem_, **puzzles** play a central role in the story and exploration, from unlocking critical doors to obtaining rare **crafting materials** and collectible**charms.**

There are different types of puzzles, including Quartz puzzles, Blood Analyzer logic challenges, safe codes, inventory and item puzzles, and optional Easter-egg challenges that give you different rewards and achievements.

## 1. Main Story & Progression Puzzles

[![Image 2: Leon Barry's Scavenger Hunt](blob:http://localhost/16f26505bc7ffaa9fa4248b04558f4c1)](https://www.keengamer.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Quartz-puzzle.jpg)

Quartz puzzle

In _Resident Evil Requiem_, the **main story progression puzzles** are key obstacles that must be solved to advance the plot and escape early nightmare scenarios.

| **Puzzle Name** | **Location** | **How to Solve** | **Reward/Purpose** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Moon Quartz Puzzle Box** | Chairman’s Office, West Wing (2F) | 1) Grab Pencil from desk. 2) Use Pencil on Notebook to reveal symbol order. 3) Enter: **Moon → Sun → Star → Moon**. | Moon Quartz – needed to open Central Hall door |
| **Sun Quartz Puzzle Box** | Lead Researcher’s Office, East Wing (2F) | 1) Get corrosive from Conference Room. 2) Melt padlock on puzzle box. 3) Observe photos/documents for symbol clues. 4) Enter: **Star → Sun → Moon → Sun**. | Sun Quartz + Leatherbound Notebook |
| **Star Quartz Puzzle Box** | Security Manager’s Office, East Wing (1F) | 1) Gain Level 2 Wristband, bring Emily. 2) Emily reads Braille symbols. 3) Enter: **Star → Star → Moon → Sun**. | Star Quartz – final piece for Central Hall door |
| **Central Hall Quartz Mechanism** | Central Hall, Care Center | Insert **Moon, Sun, Star** Quartz in matching slots to open courtyard door. | Unlocks Courtyard |

## 2. Blood Analyzer Logic Puzzles

[![Image 3: Leon Barry's Scavenger Hunt](blob:http://localhost/16f26505bc7ffaa9fa4248b04558f4c1)](https://www.keengamer.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Analyzer-Blood-Specimen-Puzzle.jpg)

Analyzer Blood Specimen Puzzle

These are logic grid puzzles that reward **crafting recipes and ammo** once solved.

| **Specimen Name** | **Location** | **Solution (Click Order)** | **Unlock / Reward** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Denatured Blood** | Blood Lab (next to analyzer) | Click the **central node** | Handgun Ammo + Hemolytic Injector crafting |
| **Reversible Blood** | Blood Lab side room (Level 1 Wristband) | · Bottom‑left → Middle → Top‑right → 2nd from top | Steroids & Stabilizer crafting |
| **Converged Blood** | Ward Office (Level 1 Wristband) | · Middle connected node → Middle node | Med Injector + 12.7×55mm ammo crafting |
| **Polymerized Blood**_(Insanity)_ | Ward Office (Insanity only) | Middle Left → Middle Right → Middle Bottom | RIP Knife + crafting items |

## 3. Inventory & Item Puzzles

In _Resident Evil Requiem_, not all challenges are symbol combinations or logic grids — several require you to interact with **inventory items and environmental objects** in specific ways to unlock new areas or obtain key progression items.

| **Puzzle Name** | **Location** | **Solution** | **Reward** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Organ Transport Box** | Garage (West Wing) | 1) In inventory, open Organ Transport Box. 2) Switch bottom‑right to **HAND**; right switch to middle; press button **5**; press button **2**; set bottom‑right back to **AUTO**. | Artificial Lungs (key progression item) |
| **Cold Storage Door** | Cold Storage (West Wing) | 1) Obtain **Wrench** from Custodian’s Office (requires Level 1 Wristband). 2) Use Wrench on hex door to open. | Artificial Heart (used in puzzle progression) |

## 4. Safe Combination Puzzles

[![Image 4: Leon Barry's Scavenger Hunt](blob:http://localhost/16f26505bc7ffaa9fa4248b04558f4c1)](https://www.keengamer.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Puzzle-Box.jpg)

Safe Box

There are multiple **safe lock challenges** scattered throughout the game that unlock supplies, ammo, and gear. Safe codes may change on Insanity mode.

| **Safe Location** | **Default Solution (Normal Mode)** | **Contents/Reward** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Bar & Lounge Safe | Left _10_ → Right _80_ → Left _30_ | Ammo & supplies |
| Exam Room Safe | Right _30_ → Left _10_ → Right _50_ | Supplies |
| Basement Safe | Right _60_ → Left _40_ → Right _80_ | Supplies |
| Sterilization Safe | Right _10_ → Left _90_ → Right _20_ | Gear |
| Monitor Control Safe | Left _50_ → Right _60_ → Left _80_ | Supplies |

## 5. Easter Egg & Side Puzzles

[![Image 5: Leon Barry's Scavenger Hunt](blob:http://localhost/16f26505bc7ffaa9fa4248b04558f4c1)](https://www.keengamer.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Leon-Barrys-Scavenger-Hunt.jpg)

Leon Barry’s Scavenger Hunt

These are optional Easter Eggs in Resident Evil Requiem that require you do a certain task to unlock Charms.

| **Puzzle** | **Location** | **How to Solve** | **Reward** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **RPD Briefcase Code** | S.T.A.R.S. Office, RPD (RE9) | 1) Find note in Wesker’s drawer pointing to library book. 2) In RPD Library (west upper level), inspect the book to view photo back: “Rising Rookie Rebecca”. 3) Input code **RRR** on briefcase. | **Power Shades Charm** |
| **Barry’s Scavenger Hunt** | RPD (Operations Room) | 1) In Operations Room, climb pallet to reach hanging TV. 2) Pick up **Jojo’s Locker Key**. 3) Open **Jojo’s Locker** in West Office. | **S.T.A.R.S. Emblem Charm**& zoo tickets |

## 6. Roulette Mini‑Puzzle

This is a unique puzzle where the roulette always cycles through **7, 15, 29** — so you only need to match your shot to the spin result.

| **Location** | **How to Solve** | **Reward** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Parlor Room, Care Center | 1) Approach roulette table & wheel. 2) Shoot one of the recurring numbers **7**, **15**, or **29**. 3) Spin the wheel repeatedly until it lands on the number you shot (reload if needed). | **Antique Coin** (unlock upgrades) |

## 7. The Final Puzzle

[![Image 6: Final Puzzle](blob:http://localhost/dfc445db966637949403c4c79bde7d07)](https://www.keengamer.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Final-Puzzle.jpg)

Final Puzzle

One of the most mysterious and ambitious challenges in _Resident Evil Requiem_ isn’t part of the main story progression but appears under the game’s **Challenges → Final Puzzle** menu after you’ve completed large portions of the campaign.

| **Step / Component** | **What You Do/Where** | **Current Result / Status** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Find Severed Hand** | After escaping the Care Center basement near the elevator | You pick up the hand — it becomes a key item in the Final Puzzle. |
| **Analyze Severed Hand** | Use a Laser Microscope at the Blood Lab or certain office areas | Instead of a crafting recipe, the analyzer displays a cryptic message _“Let’s play”_ with an RNA‑like code (e.g., _GGC AAG AUA ACG UGU CAU_). |
| **Interpret RNA Sequence** | Decoding effort using environmental clues (hourglass, blood report, other notes) | Partial mapping to symbols has been proposed (e.g., _Sun/Moon/Star_ mapping from G, U, C), but there’s no official solution yet. |
| **Adjusted Puzzle Interaction** | After analyzing the hand, some previously solved Sun/Moon/Star puzzles become active again | Community reports entering sequences like: – Sun, Sun, Star – Sun, Moon, Star – Sun, Moon, Sun – Moon, Star, Moon may produce a **childlike laugh**, but full completion remains unverified. |
| **Hourglass Clue** | Interact with hourglass hidden item and flip it, revealing _“U = 380,000”_ | Interpreted as a clue linking RNA letters to the Moon (distance from Earth). |
| **Other Environmental Clues** | Various game locations may contain related hints (e.g., orphanage carpet symbols, doll interactions) | These items can be linked to the overall final puzzle sequence/code. |
| **Challenge Completion** | Listed in Challenges menu but _not fully solved in a reproducible way_ | No confirmed final reward or complete solution has been verified besides the laugh. |
